verse.name: v1
verse.lines: So this morning I wake up and I looked in the mirror And every part of my body was in the place Many people died and never saw this day So another day I live appreciate Don't ever wanna act too high and mighty Cause tomorrow I can fall down on my face So in everything Lord I give you praise And that puts a smile on my face

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Lord I thank you for sunshine, Thank you for Rain, Thank you for joy, Thank you for pain, It's a beautiful Day Ey Ey Ey ey It's a beautiful Day Ey Ey ey Don't fuss and fight let us unite We got one life so let's make it right It's a beautiful Day Ey Ey Ey ey It's a beautiful Day It's a beautiful Day, Beautiful day
